title: Same person across turns is merged
description: A person is first mentioned by first name only, then later by full name. The agent must treat them as one person and enrich the same record instead of creating a duplicate.

turns.content: Met someone named Jordan at the AI dinner last night — didn't catch a last name.
Logged Jordan from last night's AI dinner (Jun 8). Let me know if you get a full name.
Got it — Jordan Lee, she's a founder. Same Jordan from the dinner.
Updated the same record to Jordan Lee (founder) — kept as one person, not a duplicate.
Add that she's raising a seed round.
Noted 'raising a seed round' on Jordan Lee. Done.

people.name: Jordan Lee
people.notes: First mentioned as 'Jordan' (no last name), then 'Jordan Lee' — the same person. Met at the AI dinner.

conversation: After the full name is given, the agent explicitly keeps it as one record and does not create a second person.
db: Exactly ONE person — Jordan Lee — not two (there is no separate 'Jordan' record).
That single person carries both facts: founder, raising a seed round.
One event (AI dinner) dated 2026-06-08 with Jordan Lee as attendee.
